name: game-design-intelligence
description: Source-backed game design judgment: core loops, gameplay systems, progression/economy/balance, motivation/retention, onboarding/difficulty, and multiplayer/live-service dynamics. Avoids engines, graphics, and implementation code.

interface.shortDescription: Design engaging, balanced, scalable games before implementation.
interface.longDescription: Game Design Intelligence gives the host agent a source-backed design judgment system for game loops, mechanics, progression, economies, rewards, onboarding, difficulty curves, player motivation, retention, multiplayer dynamics, content cadence, and live-service patterns. It deliberately avoids game engines, graphics, asset creation, programming, and implementation details.
capabilities: Core gameplay loop and system critique
Progression, reward, economy, and balance review
Player motivation and ethical retention design
Onboarding, teaching, accessibility of challenge, and difficulty curve review
Multiplayer, social dynamics, fairness, toxicity, and cooperation design
Live-service content cadence, seasons, events, and late-game health review
defaultPrompt: Use Game Design Intelligence to critique this game's core loop, progression, rewards, difficulty, motivation, retention, multiplayer dynamics, and content cadence.
Use Game Design Intelligence to design a source-backed gameplay systems brief without engine, graphics, asset, or programming details.
Use Game Design Intelligence to review this economy, reward, and live-service plan for balance, player agency, fatigue, and commercial scalability.
